name: Metal Stackable Wire Pantry Basket with Rubber Wood Handle Black - Brightroom™: Kitchen Storage Organizer, 9"x13.5"
description:
From fruits to other items, keep your pantry items organized with the Metal Stackable Wire Pantry Basket with Rubber Wood Handle from Brightroom™. This black pantry basket features a shape with a wired design and a cutout at the front for a standout look. Made with metal, this wired pantry basket makes a functional addition to your kitchen, while it's double rubber wood handles allow easy lifting and moving. Plus, with the stackable design it offers convenient storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
